qry:select.name: qry_Instancias
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT I.oi_instance, I.d_instance, I.f_inicio as f_inicio, EST.d_estado as est FROM WRK01_WF as W, WRK02_INSTANCES as I, WRK01_ESTADOS as EST JOIN W.oi_wf INNER I.oi_wf, I.oi_wf INNER EST.oi_wf WHERE I.d_owner = \'{%= $PROXY/@ETTY %}\' AND I.l_debug = 0 AND I.c_estado_ej in(\'r\',\'e\',\'R\',\'E\') AND EST.c_estado = I.c_estado_wf ORDER BY f_inicio DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_Instancias_Fin
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT I.oi_instance, I.d_instance, I.f_inicio as f_inicio, EST.d_estado as est, EST.c_color as color FROM WRK01_WF as W, WRK02_INSTANCES as I, WRK01_ESTADOS as EST JOIN W.oi_wf INNER I.oi_wf, I.oi_wf INNER EST.oi_wf WHERE I.d_owner = \'{%= $PROXY/@ETTY %}\' AND I.l_debug = 0 AND I.c_estado_ej in(\'f\',\'F\') AND EST.c_estado = I.c_estado_wf ORDER BY f_inicio DESC ')/ROWS/ROW
